{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33658", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact
Active Storage's proxy controller does not limit the number of byte ranges in an HTTP Range header. A request with thousands of small ranges causes disproportionate CPU usage compared to a normal request for the same file, possibly resulting in a DoS vulnerability.

### Releases
The fixed releases are available at the normal locations.

### Credit
This issue was responsibly reported by Hackerone researcher [thwin_htet](https://hackerone.com/thwin_htet).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00434, "percentile": 0.34567}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p9fm-f462-ggrg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-25T21:04:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p9fm-f462-ggrg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p9fm-f462-ggrg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33658"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-26T22:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-03-25T21:04:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/rails/rails/security/advisories/GHSA-p9fm-f462-ggrg", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33658", "https://github.com/rails/rails/releases/tag/v7.2.3.1", "https://github.com/rails/rails/releases/tag/v8.0.4.1", "https://github.com/rails/rails/releases/tag/v8.1.2.1", "https://github.com/rubysec/ruby-advisory-db/blob/master/gems/activestorage/CVE-2026-33658.yml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p9fm-f462-ggrg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/rails/rails/security-advisories/GHSA-p9fm-f462-ggrg", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/rails/rails", "summary": "Rails Active Storage has a possible DoS vulnerability in proxy mode via multi-range requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T21:23:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p9fm-f462-ggrg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "8.1.2.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "activestorage"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 8.1.0, < 8.1.2.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "8.0.4.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "activestorage"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 8.0.0, < 8.0.4.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "7.2.3.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "activestorage"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.2.3.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Rails Active Storage has a possible DoS vulnerability in proxy mode via multi-range requests
